AI Agents & Frameworks.title: Natively Adaptive Interfaces: A new framework for AI accessibility
AI Agents & Frameworks.summary: Google introduces Natively Adaptive Interfaces, a new framework aimed at enhancing AI accessibility by allowing AI models to adapt to individual user needs and contexts. This framework seeks to make AI interactions more intuitive and inclusive for a wider range of users.

AI Agents & Frameworks.summary: Google DeepMind has proposed a new framework for intelligent AI delegation, focusing on securing the nascent 'agentic web' for future economies. This initiative aims to establish protocols for safe and efficient AI agent interaction in future digital landscapes.
